race.comment: HOT MAJESTY (6) has been knocking on the door of another victory finishing runner-up at his past three starts and strikes a winnable contest here. Gets 2kg off with the claim and looks the one they all have to run down. The penny has dropped for DREAM THINKER (14) who has put back-to-back wins together. In the mix from the favourable draw. RASHFORD (4) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on. HURRICANE ROSIE (10) put the writing on the wall with an improved result last start and should be hitting peak fitness.
